text:
ありがとう！
これさえあれば、どんなに器具を
使っても、問題なさそう。

……なんだか、エンジニアみたいって？
はは、私も時々そう思うことがあるけど
これもれっきとした料理準備だからね。

器具をきちんと整えて、使えるように
することで、お客さんに最速で最良の
料理を届けることができる、でしょ？

あっ、そうだ、お礼お礼！
いつもいつもありがとう！
また、よ

Thank you so much! This should let
us use whatever sort of equipment we
want, no problem.

I look like more of an engineer than
a cook, you say? Hah! Sometimes I feel
that way too, but trust me, this is all just
part of cooking prep!

Having all our gear amped and ready
to go is the best way to make sure we
can serve up perfect meals as fast as possible.

Oh, right, can't let you leave empty handed!
I really appreciate it.
I hope you come by to help again sometime!
